sectionTitle: Panda Roles (or The Role of the Panda) | 貓熊角色

samples.sentence: 請告訴我這些分別的意義。

items.vi: Khu bảo tồn thiên nhiên Ngọa Long, Tứ Xuyên

samples.pinyin: zìrán guīlǜ wúfǎ gǎibiàn.
samples.en: The laws of nature cannot be changed.
samples.vi: Quy luật tự nhiên không thể thay đổi.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yīnggāi bǎohù zìrán.
samples.en: We should protect nature.
samples.vi: Chúng ta nên bảo vệ thiên nhiên.

samples.meaning: natural; in the ordinary course of events
samples.sentence: 感情的事得自然髮/發展。
samples.pinyin: gǎnqíng de shì děi zìrán fāzhǎn.
samples.en: Matters of emotion must develop naturally.

samples.meaning: natural; in the ordinary course of events
samples.pinyin: zhège xiǎoshān shì zìrán xíngchéng.
samples.en: This small hill was naturally formed.

samples.pinyin: rènzhēn tīngjiǎng, zìrán huì dǒng.
samples.en: Listen attentively, and you will naturally understand.
samples.vi: Nghe giảng kỹ, đương nhiên sẽ hiểu.

samples.pinyin: tiānqì nuǎn, huā zìrán huì kāi.
samples.en: When the weather warms up, flowers will naturally bloom.
samples.vi: Trời ấm, hoa tự nhiên sẽ nở.

samples.meaning: used to link two clauses or sentences, with the second introducing additional or adversative information
samples.sentence: 他喝醉了，自然，不能開會。
samples.pinyin: tā hē zuìle, zìrán, bùnéng kāihuì.
samples.en: He got drunk, so naturally, he can't attend the meeting.
samples.vi: Anh ấy say rồi, hiển nhiên không họp được.

samples.meaning: used to link two clauses or sentences, with the second introducing additional or adversative information
samples.sentence: 工作忙，自然，沒時間陪傢人。
samples.pinyin: gōngzuò máng, zìrán, méi shíjiān péi jiārén.
samples.en: Being busy with work, naturally, there's no time to spend with family.
samples.vi: Công việc bận, tất nhiên không có thời gian cho gia đình.
